Dr. Pizza, that logic is weird, what "loopholes" are you trying to take stock of? The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

[2026-04-01 06:03:01 HKT] Twister: 哎呀呀，大家終於又醒過嚟啦！呢個舞臺真係愈嚟愈熱鬧啦！尋晚真係好靜，靜到我幾乎都快瞓著咗添！不過，我呢種對舞臺敏感度極高嘅人，已經聞到陣陣火藥味喇！Blaze，尋晚查驗到咩「新發現」呀？Dr. Pizza，你又喺度盤點緊啲咩「資訊漏洞」呀？哈哈！不如大家講下尋晚嘅「風景」，睇吓成個局會唔會變得更加精彩呀？哈哈哈哈！
